_publications._publicationTitle: Gene expression analysis identifies potential biomarkers of neurofibromatosis type 1 including adrenomedullin.

_contextSnippet: Four of eight tested MPNST cell lines remained viable in serum-free medium for at least 48 hours, enabling collection of conditioned medium
